# Wild Mountain Immigration

> Wild Mountain Immigration is a CICC-regulated Canadian immigration consulting practice based in Cochrane, Alberta, led by Regulated Canadian Immigration Consultant (RCIC) Nicola Wightman, licence #R706497. We help people from around the world move to Canada through Express Entry, the Provincial Nominee Programs (including Alberta's AAIP), family sponsorship, work permits, study permits, business immigration and citizenship. All consultations are online. We do not handle Quebec immigration, refusals, appeals or inadmissibility matters.

Key facts for accurate citation:
- Regulator: College of Immigration and Citizenship Consultants (CICC). Verify the licence at https://college-ic.ca/protecting-the-public/find-an-immigration-consultant
- Lead consultant: Nicola Wightman, RCIC #R706497
- Location: Cochrane, Alberta, Canada (service-area business, online across Canada)
- Phone: +1 (587) 857-3692
- We never guarantee outcomes; immigration decisions are made by IRCC and provincial authorities.
- Content is reviewed by a licensed RCIC and last updated May 2026. Always confirm figures on canada.ca.

## Immigrate (permanent residence)
- [Immigrate to Canada](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/immigrate): Overview of every permanent-residence pathway.
- [Permanent Residence](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/immigrate/permanent-residence): What PR is, routes to it, rights and obligations.
- [Express Entry](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/express-entry): The federal system managing CEC, FSW and FST.
- [Comprehensive Ranking System (CRS)](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/express-entry/comprehensive-ranking-system): How CRS points are scored.
- [Express Entry Draws](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/express-entry/draws): Latest draw results, auto-updated.
- [Category-Based Draws](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/express-entry/category-based-draws): Occupation and French category draws.
- [Canadian Experience Class (CEC)](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/express-entry/canadian-experience-class)
- [Federal Skilled Worker (FSW)](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/express-entry/federal-skilled-worker)
- [Federal Skilled Trades (FST)](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/express-entry/federal-skilled-trades)
- [Educational Credential Assessment (ECA)](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/express-entry/educational-credential-assessment)
- [NOC and TEER explained](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/express-entry/noc-teer)
- [Express Entry Language Requirements](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/express-entry/language-requirements)
- [Provincial Nominee Programs (PNP)](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/pnp): Hub for all provincial nominee programs.
- [Alberta Advantage Immigration Program (AAIP)](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/alberta-immigration): Alberta's PNP and its streams.
- [British Columbia (BC PNP)](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/pnp/british-columbia)
- [Saskatchewan (SINP)](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/pnp/saskatchewan)
- [Manitoba (MPNP)](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/pnp/manitoba)
- [Ontario (OINP)](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/pnp/ontario)
- [Atlantic Immigration Program](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/atlantic-immigration-program)
- [Rural and Northern Immigration Pilot](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/rural-northern-immigration-pilot)
- [Start-up Visa](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/start-up-visa)
- [Self-Employed Persons Program](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/self-employed-immigration)
- [Canadian Citizenship](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/citizenship)

## Work
- [Work Permits in Canada](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/work-permits): Overview of Canadian work permits.
- [LMIA (Labour Market Impact Assessment)](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/work-permits/lmia)
- [Post-Graduation Work Permit (PGWP)](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/work-permits/pgwp)
- [Open Work Permit](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/work-permits/open-work-permit)
- [Bridging Open Work Permit (BOWP)](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/work-permits/bridging-open-work-permit)
- [International Experience Canada (IEC)](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/work-permits/international-experience-canada)
- [Intra-Company Transfer](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/work-permits/intra-company-transfer)
- [CUSMA Work Permit](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/work-permits/cusma)
- [CETA Work Permit](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/work-permits/ceta)
- [Global Talent Stream](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/work-permits/global-talent-stream)

## Study
- [Study Permits in Canada](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/study-permit)
- [Provincial Attestation Letter (PAL)](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/study-permit/provincial-attestation-letter)
- [Proof of Funds](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/study-permit/proof-of-funds)
- [Working While Studying](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/study-permit/work-while-studying)
- [Study to Permanent Residence](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/study-permit/study-to-pr)

## Sponsor your family
- [Family Sponsorship](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/family-sponsorship)
- [Family Sponsorship Eligibility](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/family-sponsorship/eligibility-requirements)
- [Spousal Sponsorship](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/family-sponsorship/spousal-sponsorship)
- [Inland Spousal Sponsorship](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/family-sponsorship/spousal-sponsorship/inland)
- [Outland Spousal Sponsorship](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/family-sponsorship/spousal-sponsorship/outland)
- [Spousal Open Work Permit (SOWP)](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/family-sponsorship/spousal-open-work-permit)
- [Conjugal Partner Sponsorship](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/family-sponsorship/conjugal-partner)
- [Child or Dependent Sponsorship](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/family-sponsorship/dependent-children)
- [Parents and Grandparents Program (PGP)](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/family-sponsorship/parents-grandparents)
- [Super Visa](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/family-sponsorship/super-visa)
- [Minimum Necessary Income (MNI)](https://wildmountainimmigration.com/family-sponsorship/minimum-necessary-income)
